findings.confidence_note: ThrottledWriteRequests not available in provided data. Confirm no write throttling in production before reducing WCU.

recommended_wcu.sizing_basis: p95(100) × 1.3 safety factor = 130, rounded to 150; max = peak(100) × 3.0 = 300

findings.confidence_note: ThrottledReadRequests not available in provided data. RCU actual inferred from cost_report pricing_note (500 RCU). Confirm no read throttling before reducing RCU.

findings.note: Without Auto Scaling, the table cannot adjust to traffic changes. Adds throttling risk on traffic spikes and prevents capacity savings on traffic lulls.

compliant.note: On-demand billing — no unused provisioned capacity. No action required.

billing_mode_recommendation.rationale: Traffic pattern is classified as steady (WCU CV ≈ 0.22, p95/avg ≈ 1.2). PROVISIONED with Auto Scaling is cost-effective for steady workloads. Switching to PAY_PER_REQUEST requires cost modeling against observed request volume — not performed here due to absence of request-count metrics.

cost_summary.non_capacity_cost_drivers: PITR enabled on both tables — contributes to cost but not addressable by capacity right-sizing. No storage, streams, global tables, or export detected.
